name: CLASSIC CHICKEN
desc: Classic Lebanese wrap with slow-roasted chicken, house garlic toum, and pickled turnip.

name: MEXICAN SHAWARMA
desc: Spiced pulled chicken with jalapeños, salsa roja, and crunchy bell peppers in warm pita.

name: PLATE SHAWARMA
desc: 200g pure roasted meat served with 2 kuboos and extra garlic paste.

name: MUTTON SHAWARMA
desc: Slow-roasted mutton with tahini, sumac onions wrapped in fresh pita bread.

name: CHEESE SHAWARMA
desc: A loaded chicken shawarma packed with melted cheddar and mozzarella cheese.

name: JUMBO FALAFEL
desc: Crispy golden falafel with fresh greens, hummus, and tahini wrapped perfectly.

name: SPICY ZINGER
desc: Crispy fried chicken strips with spicy mayo, lettuce, and jalapeños in kuboos.

name: BEEF SHAWARMA
desc: Thinly sliced marinated beef with parsley, onions, and tahini sauce.

name: SHAWARMA BOWL
desc: Saffron rice, grilled meat, garlic sauce and pickled veggies.

name: HUMMUS BOWL
desc: Creamy hummus base, grilled chicken strips, pine nuts, olive oil drizzle.

name: LOADED FRIES
desc: Crispy fries topped with shawarma meat, cheese sauce, pickled jalapeños.

name: HUMMUS & PITA
desc: Traditional creamy hummus with warm toasted pita triangles.

name: VIRGIN MOJITO
desc: Fresh mint, muddled lime, and sparkling soda with crushed ice.

name: LEMON MINT JUICE
desc: Cold-pressed lemon with fresh mint leaves and a hint of rose water.

name: WATERMELON JUICE
desc: Chilled fresh watermelon blended smooth with a pinch of sea salt.

name: MARGHERITA PIZZA
desc: Thin crust, San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, basil.

name: SHAWARMA PIZZA
desc: Pizza dough topped with shawarma meat, garlic toum, pickled onions, mozzarella.

name: CHICKEN WRAP
desc: Grilled chicken strips, lettuce, tomato, cheese, signature sauce in toasted tortilla.

name: CHOCOLATE LAVA
desc: Warm dark chocolate cake with a molten centre, served with vanilla ice cream.
